project.name: opendbc
project.description: CAN/DBC database definitions and vehicle fingerprints for openpilot/sunnypilot autonomous driving stack

layers.name: Core Library
layers.description: Main opendbc Python package for CAN/DBC database manipulation and vehicle definitions

layers.name: Vehicle Data
layers.description: DBC database files and vehicle fingerprint definitions

layers.name: Examples and Tests
layers.description: Reference implementations, example scripts, and test code

layers.name: Configuration and Documentation
layers.description: Project configuration files, setup scripts, and documentation

tour.title: Project Overview
tour.description: Start by understanding what opendbc is and how it fits into the openpilot/sunnypilot ecosystem for CAN/DBC database handling.

tour.title: Core Package Entry Point
tour.description: The main opendbc package initialization that exports the primary APIs for working with vehicle definitions.

tour.title: Core Modules
tour.description: Explore the main Python modules that provide DBC parsing, vehicle fingerprinting, and database manipulation functionality.

tour.title: Vehicle Database Files
tour.description: DBC files contain the CAN bus signal definitions for specific vehicle makes and models. These are the core data assets.

tour.title: Usage Examples
tour.description: See practical examples of how to use the opendbc library to work with vehicle definitions and CAN data.

tour.title: Tests and Validation
tour.description: Understand how the library is tested to ensure correctness and reliability of vehicle definitions.
